project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Rigged down off HBA-22 at shift change yesterday. Rig up onto HBA-06 delayed due to weather, should get rigged up on the well today. MFC40 cleaned with pressure washer and now fully closes. Continue with general prep for HBA-06. Latest lookahead has rig up MFC40 tomorrow night 22:00. According to the program no FTA required.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Josh will change out Lenny on 14th May - check-in has been confirmed for 10:30am . Josh will travel to Esbjerg on the 13th and stay overnight in the Cabinn Plus

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Keep cleaning out MFC40 to get it to close fully, and continue with Post job calibration, checks and paperwork. After MFC Slb ran a brush and set the safety valve. Will inflow test today and if all good, start rigging down from HBA-22 and onto HBA-06 (Water Injector well), with latest lookahed as rig up MFC40 early Wednesday morning, but TBC. Analysis requirement TBC.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Run complete. Max depth of 7586ft reached (Slickline depth). Data downloaded with no errors. Fingers not fully closed at surface (~70% closed) but looks to be due to debris in the yolks - will confirm during post job calibration. Will upload data to ANSA sharepoint for standard analysis.

project: PRJ03251 - Baker Hughes - Baker Hughes Qatar - NFR2-2_NFR2-5A - MFC
comment: GP & AM arrived in country at 04:00. Gate pass application in progress and H2S course booked for 11th. Latest crew mob date has slipped to the 18th.

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Keep working on DFB16, brush the well and installed safety valve. Read not be required for further operations for now. M.H will be down man tomorrow. Check in before 8:30. If nothing changes during the day.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Rigged up Memory MFC40. Battery on @04:01; Fingers closing @12:58.

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Client still discussing to move next well DFB15. Plan for today is prepare container (44195) to backload. Also container(44071) with batteries will be send it back. Read will not be required for the next wells depending on further descisions
